paragraphs.text:
%md

Data exploration:

The lattice path from root (a constant term) to leaf has max length of highest degree of the stock polynomial (HD P_stock).
Each node node_l, l in lattice path. is a p in degree l.  

Does the collection of nodes_l:

. Complete the power set for p of degree l?
. At least complete the mu set (weak) for p of degree l?

Does the collection of nodes in lattice

. Complete the power set for p of degree l?
. At least complete the mu set (weak) for p of degree l?

Note: 
There is a strong and week definition of complete mu set.
Weak: mu(n,d) for all n in d is represented at least once.
Strong: every mu in iteration of d set is represented.

paragraphs.title: 2. Case Classes
paragraphs.text:
case class dNFields(denominator:Int,numerator:Int, wNum:Int,determined:Int)
case class muFields(value:String,d:String,size:String,n:String,nBinary:String)
case class muFieldsELength(value:String,d:String,size:String,n:String,nBinary:String,length:Int)

paragraphs.title: 3. Differences graph query populating dNFields.

msg.data:
Loaded the appropriate driver and rev.
jdbc:neo4j:bolt://localhost
after wNum

paragraphs.title: 5. Pivot wNumQuery dataframe.
paragraphs.text:
import org.apache.spark.sql.{DataFrame,Dataset}
import org.apache.spark.sql.types.DecimalType


val df= z.get("wNumQuery0105").asInstanceOf[DataFrame]

val groupDf = df
                .withColumn("wNum",col("wNum").cast(DecimalType(25,0)))
                .withColumn("determined",col("determined").cast(DecimalType(25,0)))
                .orderBy(asc("wNum"))
                .groupBy("wNum")
//              .pivot("dimBD")
                .agg(sum("determined")as "Total Determined",count("wNum") as "Count wNum")
val groupDfCount = groupDf.count()
groupDf.show(groupDfCount.toInt,false)
z.put("pivotDF",groupDf)

import org.apache.spark.sql.{DataFrame, Dataset}
import org.apache.spark.sql.types.DecimalType
df: org.apache.spark.sql.DataFrame = [denominator: int, numerator: int ... 2 more fields]
groupDf: org.apache.spark.sql.DataFrame = [wNum: decimal(25,0), Total Determined: decimal(35,0) ... 1 more field]
groupDfCount: Long = 1

paragraphs.title: 6.  Distint numerators for given denominator on Differences graph/
paragraphs.text:
import org.apache.spark.sql.{DataFrame,Dataset}
import org.apache.spark.sql.types.DecimalType


val df= z.get("wNumQuery0105").asInstanceOf[DataFrame]

val groupDf = df
                .withColumn("d",col("Denominator").cast(DecimalType(25,0)))
                .withColumn("n",col("Numerator").cast(DecimalType(25,0)))
                .orderBy(asc("d"))
                .groupBy("d")
//              .pivot("dimBD")
                .agg(count("n")as "Total numerator",countDistinct("n") as "Distinct n")
val groupDfCount = groupDf.count()                
groupDf.show(groupDfCount.toInt,false)
z.put("pivotDF1",groupDf)
